item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
dang
not gonna rule it out
this also happens when i go to a professional
bastard
savage
soup
as is tradition
fellas feel free to choose also.. and anyone else! i like the things on the bottom left
but how big is a chunk???!
always the best segment
mmm hmm
we've all been there
i guess
he's all business
wait what
again
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: The Green Witch Saga (By Bonnymama7)
item.description:
Sauce is Bonnymama7
EDIT: Sauce is Bonnymama7, her bluesky link is https://bsky.app/profile/booniebaby6.bsky.social check her work out! (though she doesn't seem to update as often as she does in her twitter account). Yay the sauce finally worked! EDIT2: Thanks for the upvotes, everyone! I do some reviews (No. I'm not the artist. Check her Bluesky/Twitter) a hobby, not paid! at https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/ feel free to check them!
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: Another friday dump
item.description:
I cannot even think about the lawsuit ....
2 : I didn't even knew dancing football existed ...
Amazing details
4 : Is this some perpetual movement ?
5 : just sausages passing by ...
6 : Take my money !
7 : Did he did it ?
8 : Cleaning
9 : Small scale V-twin This guy build a copy of a Harley-Davidson engine
10 : This guy build an amazing Iris Box
11 : Swiss pocket watch of the XIX century with an unusual mechanism

item.title: Putting a face to one of many UHC denials.
item.description: bluesky post: https://bsky.app/profile/hegemommy.bsky.social/post/3lcm7m5eqls2r linked article: https://rewirenews.link/3VlJTz9 “Carrie Ann Lucas, a disability rights attorney who pioneered representation for parents with disabilities, died after an arbitrary denial from an insurance company caused a plethora of health problems, exacerbating her disabilities and eventually leading to her premature death”
item.dc:creator: hyrcan

item.title: We will keep sharing these horror stories until everyone stops denying the barbarism that is the current healthcare system.

item.dc:creator: clemdarkstarzero

item.title: This is why they are pushing trans bathroom issues so hard at the moment.
item.description: This was buried in the CNN feed halfway down. That's the point. They are using trans people bathroom issues as a way to get Matt Gaetz out of the news cycle so they could ignore his ethics report. They are using trans issues to bait us into culture war fights as a distraction.
item.dc:creator: Steviewonderduck

item.description: Man brought a knife to a dildo fight
item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: UnitedHealth Group's Board of Directors
item.description: Seems to have disappeared from their website for some reason, but here they are, in case anyone wanted to know. They ALL are responsible for denying coverage to people. Maybe they should be known for it.
item.dc:creator: gobnaitOLunacy

item.title: I'm so tired of this false narrative like he was some saint of a human
item.description: So many articles say how he was some nice guy who was approachable. Talking to other executives about him obviously gets a very bias opinion. Very few mention how he allowed their broken AI to deny coverage when their policy actually did cover it and how 90% of appeals overturned the initial AI denial. People died because of this or were put into crippling medical debt. So forgive me if I don't feel sorry that he died. Rarely do I say this, but he had it coming and I hope whomever takes his place makes the changes to actually help people. Here is hoping more evil CEOs are rethinking their life choices.
item.dc:creator: PepperoniAndFingernailPizza

item.title: Guy scores a goal using a paper plane
item.dc:creator: CoolguyComis

item.title: Average New Yorkers today
item.description: Edit: there seems to be some confusion, but these are not “OP’s photos”of a fella in a green-but-maybe-brown jacket. I didn’t curate them, or go out of my way to select them. They’re the photos that the BBC was running at the time when I made the post. I don’t have the ability to vet them. I don’t know if they’re genuine or manipulated. I do know they’re the photos chosen for the narrative by one of the hugest news outlets in the world. I see the deep irony that we don’t even know if they’re accurate, relevant, or real. (*That’s the point of making a meme that draws a comparison between a current event and a dystopian hellscape movie*) Keep your stick on the ice; we’re all in this together.
item.dc:creator: SpicyTrashManda
